---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is the current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar tools, or anything else that helps.
